name: AI Personal Assistant Daily Briefing
description: Fetches Gmail inbox and Google Calendar events, uses Claude AI to create a comprehensive daily briefing with priorities, schedule optimization, and action items, then posts to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading emails

calendarKey.description: Google Calendar connection key for fetching events

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the briefing

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the daily briefing

steps.name: Compile emails and calendar into unified context
Build Claude prompt for daily briefing
Run Claude AI to create daily briefing
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Build Slack Block Kit daily briefing
